Component 01 Optical Glass Elements
Component 02 Nanometer-Precision Gears
Component 03 Electromagnetic Shutter

AESTHETIC

SCROLL TO INTERACT

PRECISION
ENGINEERED

Every keystroke is a tactile masterpiece. We dive deep into the mechanical aesthetics of modern input devices, capturing the essence of design and functionality.

THE
SPECS

  • 01 TACTILE FEEDBACK
  • 02 ALUMINUM CHASSIS
